Four meter refs carry tenant/pool splits that require a fractional-subtract primitive not available in views.sql: B304.KB2 → B302/B303 @ 0.5/0.5; B307.KB1 → B305/B307 @ 0.5/0.5; B305.KB1 → B305 @ 1.0; B307.KB1_VMM52 → B307 @ 1.0. Source meters are attached to campus (building_id='') per the fully-split convention. Residuals of ±1–3 MWh on B302/B303/ B305/B307 are expected until a weighted-subtract primitive exists. See decisions.md in this workstream.

Reference formula doc (KYLA sheet) marks all SNV buildings as 'N/A' for KYLA. However, current snv_kyla ontology tracks 22 buildings with real allocations sourced from the SNV Excel workbook. SNV KYLA Excel cache shows real values for B203/B207/B209 etc. (e.g. B216=111 MWh Jan). The doc therefore appears incomplete / aspirational for SNV KYLA. Current ontology is authoritative; doc not applied. Note: doc also records 'STÄNGDA HUS RÄKNAS SOM ETT' for the closed-house group (B202/203/204/205/209) — this grouping has been applied in VÄRME and KV via annotations but KYLA wasn't affected since closed houses have KYLA = 0.
B312.KB1 flat at zero for the entire reference period. B312 has no active chilled-water cooling; Excel cache confirms 0. Expected inactivity.
B209.KB1 (63 days) and B304.KB1 (36 days) show early-year flat runs ending around 2025-03-06. Low-magnitude meters; normal pre-cooling-season dormancy (chilled water not yet active).
